subcodes.first_line: O My name, O Mihdi! Upon thee rest the Glory of God and His splendour. The letter of Jinab-i-Ghulam-'Ali hath reached the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی یا مهدی علیک سلام الله و بهائه نامه جناب غلام علی را که بساحت اقدس
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
